/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tst_main_qml.dir/tst_main_qml_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tst_main_qml.dir/qml_test_runner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tst_main_qml.dir/tst_main_qml_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tst_main_qml.dir/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_SenseCapture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tst_main_qml.dir/.rcc/qmlcache/tst_main_qml_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tst_main_qml.dir/.rcc/qmlcache/tst_main_qml_tst_main_qml_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tst_main_qml.dir/.qt/rcc/qrc_tst_main_qml_raw_qml_0.cpp.o -o tst_main_qml -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtQuickTest.framework/Versions/A/QtQuickTest /opt/homebrew/lib/QtQuick.framework/Versions/A/QtQuick /opt/homebrew/lib/QtTest.framework/Versions/A/QtTest -framework Security -framework ApplicationServices -framework Foundation /opt/homebrew/lib/QtOpenGL.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/QtQml.framework/Versions/A/QtQml /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
